mapper.select: SELECT admin_id AS adminId, password, name, phone, role_id AS roleId, fail_count AS failCount, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM admin_user WHERE admin_id = #{adminId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_user (admin_id, password, name, phone, role_id, fail_count, status, created_at) VALUES (#{adminId}, #{password}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{roleId}, COALESCE(#{failCount}, 0), COALESCE(#{status}, 'ACTIVE'), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_user SET fail_count = fail_count + 1, status = CASE WHEN fail_count + 1 >= 5 THEN 'LOCKED' ELSE status END, updated_at = NOW() WHERE admin_id = #{adminId}
UPDATE admin_user SET fail_count = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE admin_id = #{adminId}
UPDATE admin_user SET status = 'ACTIVE', fail_count = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE admin_id = #{adminId}
UPDATE admin_user SET status = 'DELETED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE admin_id = #{adminId}
mapper.select:
SELECT admin_id as adminId, name, phone, role_id as roleId, status, fail_count as failCount, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM admin_user
ORDER BY
admin_id name
CASE role_id WHEN 'SUPER' THEN 1 WHEN 'PROD' THEN 2 WHEN 'SALES' THEN 3 WHEN 'MATERIAL' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END
CASE status WHEN 'ACTIVE' THEN 1 WHEN 'INACTIVE' THEN 2 WHEN 'LOCKED' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END
created_at updated_at fail_count admin_id
DESC ASC
status ASC, -- ACTIVE가 먼저 CASE role_id WHEN 'SUPER' THEN 1 WHEN 'PROD' THEN 2 WHEN 'SALES' THEN 3 WHEN 'MATERIAL' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END, admin_id ASC
LIMIT #{pageStart}, #{perPageNum}
